title: Hiring Store Manager at IKEA India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at IKEA India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IKEA India Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IKEA India Digital Technologies:
IKEA India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India Digital Technologies!
